creator: fernando@mecon.gov.ar
text:
nss from ports does not build:

cc -o FreeBSD6.2_OPT.OBJ/selfserv -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe  -I/usr/local/include/nspr -L/usr/local/lib -O -fPIC -ansi -Wall -DFREEBSD -DHAVE_STRERROR -DHAVE_BSD_FLOCK -DXP_UNIX -UDEBUG -DNDEBUG -D_THREAD_SAFE -D_REENTRANT -DNSS_ENABLE_ECC -I../../dist/FreeBSD6.2_OPT.OBJ/include  -I../../dist/public/ -I../../dist/private/  -O -fPIC -ansi -Wall -DFREEBSD -DHAVE_STRERROR -DHAVE_BSD_FLOCK -DXP_UNIX -UDEBUG -DNDEBUG -D_THREAD_SAFE -D_REENTRANT -DNSS_ENABLE_ECC -I../../../dist/FreeBSD6.2_OPT.OBJ/include  -I../../../dist/public/ -I../../../dist/private/ -I../../../dist/public/nss -I../../../dist/public/nspr -I../../../dist/public/libdbm -I../../../dist/FreeBSD6.2_OPT.OBJ/../public/security -I./include   -O -fPIC -ansi -Wall -DFREEBSD -DHAVE_STRERROR -DHAVE_BSD_FLOCK -DXP_UNIX -DNSPR20 -DNSS_ENABLE_ECC -UDEBUG -DNDEBUG -D_THREAD_SAFE -D_REENTRANT -DNSS_ENABLE_ECC -I../../../../dist/FreeBSD6.2_OPT.OBJ/include  -I../../../../dist/public/nss -I../../../../dist/private/nss -I../..!
 /../../dist/public/seccmd -I../../../../dist/public/dbm  FreeBSD6.2_OPT.OBJ/selfserv.o  ../../../../dist/FreeBSD6.2_OPT.OBJ/lib/libsectool.a  -Wl,-rpath-link,../../../../dist/FreeBSD6.2_OPT.OBJ/lib -L../../../../dist/FreeBSD6.2_OPT.OBJ/lib -lssl3 -lsmime3 -lnss3 -L../../../../dist/FreeBSD6.2_OPT.OBJ/lib -lplc4 -lplds4 -lnspr4  -pthread
FreeBSD6.2_OPT.OBJ/selfserv.o(.text+0x2f4b): In function `.L354':
: undefined reference to `SSL_CanBypass'
FreeBSD6.2_OPT.OBJ/selfserv.o(.text+0x30c3): In function `.L354':
: undefined reference to `SSL_CanBypass'
gmake[2]: *** [FreeBSD6.2_OPT.OBJ/selfserv] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/tmp/usr/ports/security/nss/work/nss-3.11.9/mozilla/security/nss/cmd/selfserv'

Fix: 

Don't know.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/security/nss; make
